description: Expected validation state for mx_unam_vancouver — UNAM salud (iSGLT-2 nefropatía, estudio de cohorte retrospectivo)
notes: UNAM health sciences — Vancouver style (numbered). IMRyD structure with Antecedentes/Objetivo/Métodos/Resultados/Conclusiones embedded in structured abstracts. 5-person committee. Spanish + English abstracts. 8 BibTeX entries (WHO report, journal articles, book, KDIGO guideline). 9 citation blocks across 5 sections. Statistical terminology (HR, IC, p-values). Nephrology/endocrinology clinical research context. Clinical exclusion/inclusion criteria in methodology. Tests: Vancouver numbered bibliography style, medical terminology, structured abstract format.
